verdict: KILL (pre-registered criterion: both seeds <= 0 at step-150)

config.reward: calib-only (calibration form, weight 1.0) vs relabel sidecar v2

evidence_quality: Strongest RL test this project has run: honest oracle-validated reward (in-family calib), 5x the seedA2 headroom (0.157 vs 0.03), true warm-start, 2 independent seeds, CI-based gates with known noise floors, format intact (0 parse fails all 6 captures), no Goodhart signature (calib_mean/std stable, kl ~0.01).
conclusion: 6/6 checkpoint reads <= 0 across 2 seeds x 3 checkpoints. Per-step judge-score calibration reward does not improve on a converged SFT judge even under ideal conditions. SFT on better labels captured the available value (0.748 -> 0.827); the remaining +0.157 to ceiling is not reachable by this reward family. RL closed. v1.3 = final judge artifact for v3.0; route Phase 11 packaging (two-model: v1.3 judge + v1.2 gen).
